title: Space model (Space, roles, channels, categories, invites)
description: Implement the full JMAP Chat Space model: Space/get, changes, set, query, queryChanges, join. SpaceRole with named permissions. SpaceMember with role assignments. Category and ChannelPermission. SpaceInvite: has both 'id' (JMAP-opaque, server-assigned) and 'code' (user-shareable, server-assigned) — these are distinct fields. Space/join matches on 'code' field not 'id'. SpaceInvite/set create: server assigns both id and code; clients MUST NOT supply either. SpaceInvite/set update: MUST return forbidden SetError. Channel Chats (Chat kind: channel) within Spaces. Space permission resolution per spec §space-permissions. Space state propagated to members via Peer/groupUpdate-equivalent ClearMessage variants.
close_reason: Space model fully implemented: migration v4 (space_member.role, space_invite, category tables), store methods (get/query/create/update/delete spaces, invite CRUD, member management), JMAP handlers Space/get+changes+set+query+queryChanges+join, SpaceInvite/get+set (update returns forbidden). 8 new unit tests.
